---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't today?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Be specific about the user-facing behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Package Scope

Which package(s) would this affect?

- [ ] `@gearu/core` — Schema, plugin system, SEO, database
- [ ] `@gearu/admin` — Admin panel UI
- [ ] `gearu` (CLI) — CLI tool
- [ ] `@gearu/plugin-analytics` — Analytics plugin
- [ ] `@gearu/plugin-leads` — Leads plugin
- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Other

## Impact

- [ ] This changes an existing public API (breaking change)
- [ ] This requires a database migration
- [ ] This affects the plugin interface (`GearuPlugin`)
- [ ] This is purely additive (no breaking changes)

## Additional Context

Mockups, diagrams, links to similar implementations in other tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
